seo.metaTitle: cPanel Hosting India — Easy Website Management, Free SSL & 99.9% Uptime | ICSDC
seo.metaDescription: ICSDC cPanel Hosting gives you the industry-standard control panel, LiteSpeed servers, free SSL, daily backups, and one-click installs. Manage your website with ease from ₹99/month.

api::cpanel-hosting-page.cpanel-hosting-.heroTitle: The World's Most Popular Control Panel — cPanel Hosting Made Simple
api::cpanel-hosting-page.cpanel-hosting-.heroSubtitle: LiteSpeed Servers. Free SSL. One-Click Installs.
api::cpanel-hosting-page.cpanel-hosting-.heroDescription: Host your website with confidence on ICSDC's cPanel-powered hosting. Get the industry-standard control panel, blazing-fast LiteSpeed servers, free SSL certificates, daily backups, and one-click WordPress installation — all starting at just ₹99/month.

pillars.title: cPanel Control Panel
pillars.desc: The world's most popular hosting control panel — manage files, databases, email, and more from one intuitive dashboard.

pillars.title: LiteSpeed Web Server
pillars.desc: LiteSpeed delivers up to 9x faster page loads than Apache — your visitors get a blazing-fast experience every time.

pillars.title: Free SSL Certificate
pillars.desc: Every domain and subdomain gets a free Let's Encrypt SSL certificate — HTTPS out of the box, no extra cost.

pillars.title: Daily Backups
pillars.desc: Automated daily backups with 30-day retention. Restore your entire account or individual files in seconds.

api::cpanel-hosting-page.cpanel-hosting-.plansSubtitle: All plans include cPanel, LiteSpeed, free SSL, daily backups, and 24/7 expert support. No hidden fees.
api::cpanel-hosting-page.cpanel-hosting-.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Run a Professional Website
api::cpanel-hosting-page.cpanel-hosting-.featuresSubtitle: ICSDC cPanel Hosting packs enterprise-grade features into every plan — no upgrades needed.

features.title: LiteSpeed Web Server
features.desc: LiteSpeed's event-driven architecture handles thousands of concurrent requests with minimal memory — dramatically faster than Apache.

features.title: Free SSL / HTTPS
features.desc: Auto-installed Let's Encrypt SSL for every domain and subdomain. Secure your site and improve Google rankings at no cost.

features.title: Full cPanel Access
features.desc: Manage files, databases, email accounts, domains, cron jobs, and error logs from the world's most-used hosting control panel.

features.title: Daily Automated Backups
features.desc: Scheduled daily backups with multi-week retention. One-click restore of full accounts, databases, or individual files.

features.title: Professional Email Hosting
features.desc: Unlimited professional email accounts (you@yourdomain.com) with spam filtering, webmail, and IMAP/POP3/SMTP access.

features.title: One-Click App Installer
features.desc: Install WordPress, Joomla, Drupal, Magento, and 400+ apps in one click via Softaculous — no technical knowledge required.

api::cpanel-hosting-page.cpanel-hosting-.whySubtitle: Trusted by millions worldwide, cPanel on ICSDC's infrastructure means the best of both worlds — ease of use and raw performance.

whyCards.desc: Start small and upgrade instantly as your traffic grows — no migrations, no downtime, just a few clicks in your control panel.

whyCards.desc: Servers hosted in India ensure ultra-low latency for Indian visitors, compliance with local regulations, and fast page loads.

api::cpanel-hosting-page.cpanel-hosting-.builtinTitle: Powerful Built-In cPanel Tools at Your Fingertips
api::cpanel-hosting-page.cpanel-hosting-.builtinSubtitle: cPanel comes loaded with tools that make website management fast and intuitive — no coding required.

builtinFeatures.title: File Manager
builtinFeatures.desc: Upload, edit, move, and manage all your website files directly in the browser — no FTP client needed.

builtinFeatures.title: MySQL & phpMyAdmin
builtinFeatures.desc: Create and manage databases visually with phpMyAdmin. Full MySQL support for WordPress, Joomla, and custom apps.

builtinFeatures.title: Email Manager
builtinFeatures.desc: Create email accounts, set up forwarders, manage autoresponders, and configure spam filters — all from cPanel.

builtinFeatures.title: Awstats & Webalizer
builtinFeatures.desc: Built-in traffic analytics show visitor counts, top pages, referrers, and bandwidth usage — no external tools needed.

faq.question: What is cPanel and why is it the best hosting control panel?
faq.answer: cPanel is the world's most popular web hosting control panel, used by millions of websites globally. It provides a graphical interface to manage all aspects of your hosting account — files, databases, email, domains, SSL certificates, and more — without needing any command-line knowledge. Its intuitive design and comprehensive toolset make it the preferred choice for beginners and experts alike.

faq.question: Can I host multiple websites on one cPanel account?
faq.answer: Yes. The Professional plan supports 5 websites and the Business plan supports unlimited websites — all managed from a single cPanel login. You can add addon domains, create separate database users, and manage each site independently.

faq.question: How do I install WordPress with cPanel?
faq.answer: With ICSDC cPanel Hosting, installing WordPress takes under 60 seconds. Simply log in to cPanel, open Softaculous Apps Installer, click WordPress, fill in your site details, and hit Install. Your WordPress site will be live immediately with no technical configuration required.

faq.question: Is free SSL included? How does it work?
faq.answer: Yes. Every ICSDC cPanel Hosting plan includes free Let's Encrypt SSL certificates for all your domains and subdomains. SSL is automatically installed and renewed — you don't need to do anything. Your site will serve HTTPS from day one, improving both security and SEO rankings.

faq.question: What happens if my site goes down? Are backups automatic?
faq.answer: ICSDC guarantees 99.9% uptime with redundant infrastructure and 24/7 monitoring. In the rare event of any issue, our team is alerted immediately. All plans include automated daily backups — Starter plans retain 7 days of backups, Professional 14 days, and Business 30 days. You can restore your site with a single click from cPanel's backup manager.
